title: Low-Calorie Dense Fresh Lime Leaves Stir-Fry
description: This low-calorie and dense dish features fresh makrut lime leaves, designed to be a hangover-cure Slovakian-inspired recipe suitable for those following a low-calorie diet.
instructions: Wash and dry the makrut lime leaves.
Mince the garlic cloves and chop the onion finely.
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add a small amount of olive oil to prevent sticking.
Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the pan, stir for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Fold in chopped bell peppers, cook for another 3-5 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the washed makrut lime leaves to the pan. Stir frequently to avoid burning.
Cook for approximately 5-7 more minutes or until the lime leaves are dense and the vegetables are fully cooked.
Stir in any additional herbs, spices, or seasonings as desired.
Garnish with fresh lime juice if desired.
